title: Abdominal pain
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines adult abdominal-pain use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.
